name: Asparagus with Orange Dipping Sauce (Disney)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place a saucepan wide enough to hold the asparagus spears lengthwise on the stove over medium-high heat.
2. Add about three-quarters of water, salt, and bring to a boil.
3. Gently lower the asparagus into the boiling water, return to a boil, and cook until tender when pierced with a fork (about 2 minutes depending on thickness). Do not overcook.
4. Remove from water, rinse under cold running water, and drain on a clean kitchen towel.
5. Whisk orange juice, grated orange rind, olive oil, sesame oil, salt, and pepper in a bowl until well combined.
6. Arrange asparagus on serving platter with sauce on the side. Serve warm or chilled.
